name: Pinwheel
description: Payroll connectivity API for income/employment verification and direct deposit switching.

seo.title: Pinwheel — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Pinwheel: Payroll connectivity API for income/employment verification and direct deposit switching.

when_to_use: Consumer-permissioned payroll data for income verification
Direct deposit switching API for neobanks and fintechs
Employment history API for lending and insurance underwriting
Earned wage access payroll connectivity for financial apps
Replacing manual paystub uploads with real-time payroll data

pros: Payroll connectivity for income and employment
Purpose-built APIs for banks and lenders
cons: Heavy competition from Argyle and Atomic
review.verdict: Solid US payroll API for banks and lenders, differentiated more by partnerships than tech.
review.best_for: US banks and lenders focused on direct-deposit and income verification
review.not_for: Non-US teams or those needing non-payroll financial data sources

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
